result.stdout:
Usage: generatorlog-analyze [options] <file1.etl> [file2.nettrace ...]

Analyze Roslyn source generator events from ETL, nettrace, or zip files.

Options:
  --csv, -c <path>   Export results as CSV to the specified file.
  --verbose, -v      Show detailed diagnostic output.
